Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you have multiple Personas in your possession, you can use {f 0 1 2}Change Persona{f 0 1 27} to swap out your equipped Persona with another in your stock.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Changing Personas will also change your stats, affinities, and usable skills based on the Persona you switch to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 5}During battle, open the Persona submenu to view skills, then press {f 1 3 114} or {f 1 3 117} to change Personas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can also change your equipped Persona outside of battle by pressing {f 1 3 112} to open the menu, then navigating to the Persona submenu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can change Personas at any time, but in battle, you can only do so {f 0 1 2}before taking action that turn{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
